{{Quote|Welcome to Spuma Flats. I trust you enjoyed the ride. The Rebel forces are at grid reference 678/446. You all know what you have to do. Good luck and good hunting.|[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Zel Johans|Johans]]|<ref name="The Assault on Protazk">{{WEGCite|story=The Assault on Protazk|book=Imperial Sourcebook|reprint=1}}</ref>}}
The '''Assault on Protazk''' took place on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Protazk]] as part of the [[Kwymar Suppressions/Legends|Kwymar Suppressions]], in [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]]. The Rebel forces were defeated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Background==
{{Quote|Keep your eyes peeled, this place is crawling with Rebel scum.|[[Gortz]]|<ref name="The Assault on Protazk" />}}
Early during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], the Rebel bases in the [[Kwymar sector/Legends|Kwymar sector]] came under attack by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces in a campaign known as the [[Kwymar Suppressions/Legends|Kwymar Suppressions]]. [[Protazk]] was one of those [[Planet/Legends|planets]] attacked.<ref name="Valance1" />

==The battle==
{{Quote|Rebel airspeeders approaching in attack formation. Squad three, peel off and intercept.|Colonel Johans|<ref name="The Assault on Protazk" />}}
The battle began when the [[Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit/Legends|Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit]] [[Hovertank/Legends|repulsortanks]] attacked a fortified area known as the [[Spuma Flats]]. [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Zel Johans]] personally led the [[Regiment/Legends|regiment]] in his tank. While the others tanks engaged the [[Laser turret/Legends|laser turrets]] and [[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel troopers]] hidden in trenches, [[Squad three]] intercepted a group of [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]].<ref name="TAoP" />

Once all fortification were destroyed, [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] landed in [[Imperial Armored Transport]]s and assaulted the Rebel Infantry in the trenches.<ref name="TAoP" />
